title: bouteloua uniflora
intro: Bouteloua uniflora, also known as Blue Grama Grass, is a perennial grass species native to the Great Plains region of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bouteloua uniflora include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Bouteloua uniflora can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
